title: Allergy-Friendly Steakhouses
content: Captured from the Spokin Allergy-Friendly Steakhouses article on 2026-06-28. The Illinois section included Steak 48, Gibson's, RPM Steak, The Clubhouse Oakbrook, Chicago Cut, Prime & Provisions Steakhouse, Maple & Ash, Gibsons Bar & Steakhouse (Oakbrook), Joe's Seafood, Prime Steak & Stone Crab, Tango Sur, Weber Grill Restaurant, Sullivan's Steakhouse, 100 South Chop House & Grille, and Nick & Nino's Penthouse Steakhouse.
